title: Professional Dad Mode Activated Funny Dad Shirt for Father’s Day
description:
Being a dad is a full-time job—and sometimes you just need to let the world know when you’re operating at peak 'Dad Mode.' This witty design blends humor with truth, because let’s face it: dads deserve a badge of honor for juggling chaotic schedules, life lessons, and endless requests for snacks. Whether it’s Father’s Day, the dad-tastic office outing, or just a casual Saturday spent fixing everything under the sun, this shirt delivers the perfect mix of relatability and laugh-out-loud honesty. 

Perfect for:
- Dads who like funny and practical gifts.
- Celebrating Father’s Day or dad birthdays with humor.
- Pairing with jeans, shorts, or cargo pants during peak 'Dad Mode.'

DETAILS:
- Crisp typography with fun, professional vibes.
- Designed to stand out equally on light and dark colors.
- Artwork features bold text and retro-style dad iconography, emphasizing 'Professional Dad Mode: Activated.'
- Available in a full range of sizes and colors, made-to-order just for you.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
